title: Dysfunctional's Tech, Bombs, Guns, and War
description: The worlds BEST all purpose war pack for Minecraft, NOW ON MODRINTH!!!
body:
[![DTBGWTitle](https://codeberg.org/DysfunctionalEntertainment/Assets/raw/branch/main/Images/Modpacks/Titles/DTBGW%20Title%20Modrinth%20Title.png)](https://modrinth.com/organization/dysfunctionalentertainment)

If you want a more "feature complete" verson we're [also on CurseForge.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/dysfunctionals-tech-bombs-guns-war)

# 1.12.2:
NOW ON MODRINTH! This pack is the offical port of our pack from CurseForge. Unfortuneatly lots of concessions had to be made due to many mod authors not uploading their mods here. Cause of this the Modrinth version is VERY striped down compaired to the CurseForge pack, we feel however the core of the pack successfully remained intact.

Think of this pack less of a port and more of a "Lite" version of the CurseForge pack.

# Pack Download:
For ease of use install a custom Minecraft launcher like the official [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/app) or [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/). Using one of these will automatically manage and update your instance so it is recommended.

# Apex Hosting:
The best way to support our small teams projects is to purchase a server from [ApexHosting.](https://billing.apexminecrafthosting.com/aff.php?aff=8139)

![ApexBanner](https://cdn.apexminecrafthosting.com/img/theme/apex-hosting-mobile.png)
